span.p:
The config DECIDES, then the job BRANCHES. Standard models (ATT/ATE/DID/pre-post) share one
pipeline and fan out with for_each. Each structurally-different LME model is its OWN branch with
its OWN feature/matching/model notebooks, NO loop, so each can diverge freely. Add another such
model = add its rows + a branch. Add a standard model = a leaf notebook + a config row.

svg.text: MODULAR — config-driven BRANCH: standard for_each loop + a separate branch per LME model
